reach_why: Combines familiar ideas on framework dependence, search expansion, and path dependence; not wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links simplicity relativity with recursive search lock-in and deliberate expansion phases.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable in search systems, but key terms remain representation-dependent and underspecified.
explanation: Discovery can mistake temporary simplicity for deep progress and become locked into contingent abstractions.
